rationale: No events directly affecting Portugal; Iran deal stalemate keeps EU energy price outlook uncertain but no new development changes daily life.

top_events.title: Trump says US-Iran deal to be signed Sunday; Tehran disputes timing
top_events.summary: Continued Iran deal uncertainty keeps EU gas/oil prices volatile, indirectly affecting Portuguese energy bills and cost of living. No resolution yet.

top_events.title: Why is the price of gold trending down?
top_events.summary: Declining gold prices reflect global risk-off sentiment easing; minor signal for Portuguese savings and financial markets, no significant daily impact.

top_events.title: Warner Bros $111bn sale to Paramount approved by US justice department
top_events.summary: Major US media merger approved; negligible direct impact on Portuguese daily life, minor background noise for media consumers.
